policy: The Capital Radar homepage is a four-section decision surface: Macro, Decision chart, Holdings, and Opportunity. Supporting modules such as System Health, Cross-Asset Lens, Strategy Route, Market Tape, and Kostolany Egg are data/evidence inputs, not standalone visible web sections. Visible information must support action, invalidation, evidence quality, or portfolio permission.

baseline.description: Create clean four-section operational HTML shell before sections are injected.

sections.name: System / Data Health
sections.description: Disabled from the visible homepage. Health remains an internal edit-readiness artifact, not a product section.

sections.name: Macro
sections.description: Root market permission page. Macro absorbs regime, liquidity, rates, credit, confirmation, source quality, invalidation logic, and data-backed asset-class workbenches.

sections.name: Decision chart
sections.description: SPX working chart, price zones, confirmation strip, support, resistance, target, and invalidation levels.

sections.name: Cross-Asset Lens
sections.description: Disabled as a visible section. Its signals should be summarized inside Macro.

sections.name: Asset Allocation Route
sections.description: Disabled as a visible section. Its permission logic should be summarized inside Macro, Holdings, and Opportunity.

sections.name: Holdings
sections.description: Existing portfolio positions mapped to ruled zones, source authority, sizing implications, and invalidation rules.

sections.name: Opportunity
sections.description: Asymmetric research queue. Ideas are research candidates, not automatic capital allocations.

sections.name: Market Tape
sections.description: Disabled as a visible section. Tape signals should be folded into Macro confirmation and contradiction logic.

sections.name: Trust / Data Quality
sections.description: Disabled from homepage. Trust/source diagnostics are represented inside the four canonical sections.

sections.name: Macro Cycle Board
sections.description: Disabled from homepage to avoid duplicate macro diagrams.

sections.name: Kostolany Egg Diagram
sections.description: Disabled as a visible section. Cycle logic should be summarized in Macro rather than shown as a standalone diagram.

cleanup.description: Remove legacy sections and normalize the four visible homepage sections only.
